title: 5 Reasons This Low-Drama Gas Stock Keeps Beating the Market
text: While high-growth stocks continue to be volatile, this gas and chemical company is delivering solid, undramatic returns.

title: Linde Signs Record Small On-Site Contracts in 2021
text: GUILFORD, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 27, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has achieved another record year for small on-site contracts, signing 43 new projects during 2021, a 19% increase compared with 2020. Linde signed new agreements totaling $170 million in 2021, with customers across 20 countries and end-markets including energy, electronics, mining and manufacturing.

title: Linde Announces Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
text: GUILDFORD, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 12, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN; FWB:LIN) will release its fourth quarter 2021 financial results on Thursday, February 10, 2022, at 06:00 EST/midday CET. The Company will host and webcast its conference call at 10:00 EST/16:00 CET, which will be available to the public and the media in listen-only mode.

title: Worried About Missing Your 2022 Financial Goals? Consider These Three Blue Chip Dividend Stocks
